tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies Homey API credentials and connectivity.

tools.name: homey-get-user
tools.description: Get authenticated user information from Homey

tools.name: homey-list-devices
tools.description: List all devices connected to Homey with their zone, class, capabilities, and availability status

tools.name: homey-get-device
tools.description: Get detailed information and current state of a specific Homey device by ID

tools.name: homey-set-capability
tools.description: Set a device capability value (e.g., turn on/off, set brightness, temperature). Use homey-list-devices to find device IDs and capabilities.

value.description: Value to set (boolean for onoff, number 0-1 for dim, number for temperature)

tools.name: homey-list-flows
tools.description: List all flows (automations) configured in Homey

tools.name: homey-trigger-flow
tools.description: Trigger (run) a Homey flow by its ID

tools.name: homey-list-zones
tools.description: List all zones (rooms/areas) configured in Homey
